strengths: Private — no data leaves the machine
weaknesses: Can struggle with complex multi-step logic

routing_rules.condition: Simple CRUD (clock in, add expense, capture note)
routing_rules.reason: No reasoning needed — just format and send the API call

routing_rules.condition: Data retrieval (list sessions, read schedule, get companies)
routing_rules.reason: Just fetching data, no analysis required

routing_rules.condition: Status check (any active sessions? any pending items?)
Financial analysis (tax planning, expense trends, revenue forecasting)
routing_rules.reason: Complex multi-step reasoning over financial data
Multi-source synthesis — needs to combine sessions, schedule, treasury, compliance

routing_rules.condition: Strategic advice (what should I prioritize? how should I allocate time?)
routing_rules.reason: Requires understanding patterns and making recommendations
Needs to articulate technical requirements clearly

routing_rules.condition: Compliance analysis (what deadlines are approaching? what filings needed?)
routing_rules.reason: Needs to reason about dates, regulations, and implications

routing_rules.condition: Cross-company comparison (time allocation, revenue split, productivity)

routing_rules.reason: Try local first — escalate to cloud only if local can't handle it

escalation_triggers: Local model response is uncertain or hedging
Task requires comparing data across multiple companies
User explicitly says 'think hard' or 'use Opus'
Task requires generating a document or report
